description_long: This is a modern, plush pink sofa with a rounded, enveloping silhouette and vertically channeled upholstery along the backrest and armrests. The sofa features a single, seamless seat cushion that extends the full width, providing a smooth and uninterrupted sitting area. The armrests are integrated into the backrest, curving gently outward and maintaining a consistent height with the back. The upholstery appears to be a soft fabric, likely velvet or microfiber, with a matte finish and subtle sheen. The base of the sofa is minimally visible, suggesting either a recessed or hidden leg design for a floating appearance. The overall design is contemporary and inviting, suitable for stylish urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or upscale public spaces.
description: A plush, modern pink sofa with vertically channeled upholstery, integrated curved armrests, and a seamless seat cushion. The design is soft, inviting, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, the continuous seat cushion, and the vertically channeled backrest and armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, curved armrest and the depth of the seat, with the channeled upholstery visible along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, rounded backrest with vertical channeling and the sofa's enveloping shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest and the sofa's overall depth and curvature.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, seamless seat cushion with a continuous, vertically channeled backrest and armrests; all cushions are attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, integrated with the backrest, medium height, gently curved outward, and fully upholstered with vertical channeling.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visibly exposed; the base appears recessed or hidden, giving the sofa a floating look.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, medium-height backrest with a rounded, enveloping shape and vertical channeling; no segmentation or loose cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid pink fabric with a vertically channeled, quilted texture; no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
